Idea Power / Idea Power Adventures
Keeping track of the successes these techniques bring you will motivate you to use them
and enable you to enjoy even more success!
I would love to hear about them as well. If you wouldn’t mind sharing them with me, email
your stories to me: David.Deutsch@MarketingRebel.com
You never know, I might just use your story in the next edition of Idea Power (so please let
me know if I have permission to re-use it!).
Box or technique I used:
How it worked/was successful:
What it did for me, as specifically and quantifiably as possible. For example: Dollar
amount of extra income or profit.
